final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Lillestrøm%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '3205';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredomrid, skredomrnavn, omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT s.id, s.ssbid1000m, s.geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km s WHERE ST_Intersects(s.geom, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '3205'));

3.description: get quick-clay polygons (utlosningomr) for spatial filtering

4.description: find parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons (parcels in quick-clay)

5.description: get 1 km grid cells for Norway (will be reduced to municipality via spatial join)

6.description: reduce grid cells to those intersecting the municipality

7.description: assign parcels-in-quickclay to grid cells (count parcels per grid cell)
